shortAnswer: AFP is normally elevated mainly during pregnancy and, outside of pregnancy, is used to monitor liver or germ cell tumors. Chronic liver disease can also elevate the value without a tumor being present.
metaDescription: AFP elevated? Meaning of the tumor marker and possible causes explained.
causesElevated: Liver cancer or germ cell tumors (one of several possible causes)
doctorQuestions: What is the cause of my elevated AFP value?
